label: Place
content: A named geographic location with no further structure (yet). Vancouver, Seattle, Skagit Valley, Tacoma, Marine Drive, Highway 5, Point Roberts are instances. As more is learned a place may grow into a `region`, `facility`, `harbor`, or `dive-site` prototype.

_provenance.rationale: Catch-all for thinly-described place mentions; intentionally weak so the discovery loop has somewhere to put under-specified places without inventing a richer prototype prematurely.
